name: valid_payment_2hop
description: Root SD-JWT (user) + terminal KB-SD-JWT (agent), in budget.

name: valid_payment_3hop
description: user root -> agent intermediate (cnf=cp) -> cp terminal.

name: valid_payment_3hop_issuer_jwt_hash
description: 3-hop where the intermediate hop binds via issuer_jwt_hash.

name: tampered_root_payload
description: One byte flipped in the root issuer-JWT payload.

name: wrong_cnf_key
description: Terminal hop signed by a key not named in the prior cnf.jwk.
reason: hop signature does not verify under prev cnf.jwk

name: binding_sd_hash_mismatch
description: Terminal hop's sd_hash binds a different root than the one presented.

name: aud_mismatch
description: Valid chain, verifier expects a different audience.

name: nonce_mismatch
description: Valid chain, verifier expects a different nonce.

name: wrong_root_key
description: Valid chain verified against an unrelated root key.
reason: root signature does not verify under given key

name: wrong_typ
description: Terminal hop carries an unrecognized 'typ'.

name: both_binding_claims
description: Terminal hop has BOTH sd_hash and issuer_jwt_hash.

name: neither_binding_claim
description: Terminal hop has NEITHER sd_hash nor issuer_jwt_hash.

name: terminal_with_cnf
description: A terminal-typ hop that illegally carries a cnf claim.

name: intermediate_without_cnf
description: An intermediate-typ hop that is missing its required cnf claim.

name: expired
description: Terminal hop carries an exp in the past.

name: alg_swap_none_root
description: Root header alg downgraded to 'none'.

name: alg_swap_hs256_hop
description: Terminal hop header alg swapped to HS256.

name: valid_x5c
description: Root signed by an x5c leaf chaining leaf->intermediate->trusted root.

name: x5c_untrusted_root
description: Valid chain, but anchored against an unrelated trusted root.
reason: does not chain to a trusted root

name: x5c_fail_open
description: Valid chain with NO trusted roots configured (AP2 fails open).
reason: no trustedRoots — refusing to fail open

name: x5c_expired
description: Leaf certificate is expired (AP2 does not check validity).

name: x5c_non_ca_intermediate
description: Intermediate lacks basicConstraints CA:TRUE (AP2 ignores it).

name: x5c_wrong_curve_leaf
description: Leaf key is P-384, not P-256 (AP2 accepts ES384).
